title: gynura procumbens
intro: Gynura procumbens, also known as bunga kantan or red okra, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gynura procumbens include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and capsules, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
